png_note: mmdc not available in this environment; source-level pre-flight completed in full. PNG render is best-effort — visual checks deferred to human review at HITL #3.

findings.detail: 7 nodes across two direction:TB subgraphs in a flowchart LR root. Side-by-side contrast layout exactly matches the diagram intent. All node labels are 2–3 words, all trace to corpus Core Concepts phrases. Title 'GIGO — Biased Data Produces Biased Output' sits in the --- config block, not as a ghost node. Color tiers are correct: start (blue) for data-entry nodes, auto (purple) for processing/output nodes, done (green) for the positive terminal. No jargon-only bare labels (GIGO only appears in a subtitle span where it was corpus-defined). Linear chains inside each subgraph with no branching.

stats.layout: flowchart LR (two direction:TB subgraphs — side-by-side panels)
